prompt: Using the provided reference image, create a cleaned-up revised version of the same Taisho-romantic mystery game title screen. Preserve the overall composition, Japanese logo text, ornate UI frame, character placement, moonlit Ginza street setting, and all interface elements unchanged, including the 2 top circular buttons and the 6 bottom menu buttons labeled 「はじめから」, 「つづきから」, 「記録」, 「設定」, 「資料室」, and 「特典」. Redraw the linework and repaint the colors for a sharper, higher-quality illustration with clearer edges, richer but still dark antique tones, and more polished lighting. Correct the streetcar so it has a more believable vintage tram shape, perspective, windows, rails, and front details. Greatly reduce GPT-image-style tiny dot garbage, speckle noise, random artifacts, muddy textures, and messy broken lines while keeping the cinematic nighttime atmosphere, falling petals, wet pavement reflections, newspapers, mask, pocket watch, telescope, pen, and decorative border.
